name: HXT_WC_CLICKED_TIMES
description: This table stores web clock events and time information clicked by users

columns.Name: WC_CLICKED_TIME_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key

columns.Name: WORK_FROM_HOME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag for Work From Home

columns.Name: DEVICE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Device Type of the Time Event

columns.Name: GEO_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Geo Coordinates of the time event

columns.Name: GEO_LOC_EXCEPTION
columns.Comments: Indicates the reason why geo coordinates were not captured

columns.Name: GEOFENCE_ERROR
columns.Comments: Identifies why geofence validation failed for web clock event.

columns.Name: GEOFENCE_VAL_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates geofence validation succeeded or not for web clock event.

columns.Name: TIME_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id returned by time event api

columns.Name: CLICKED_TIME_STRING
columns.Comments: Stores device time if there is no adjustement else it contains the adjusted time

columns.Name: DEVICE_CLICKED_TIME_STRING
columns.Comments: Stores the initial device time before adjustement. If there is no adjustement, this field is empty

columns.Name: CLICKED_SERVER_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores the server clicked time

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the enterprise id of the user

columns.Name: MANUAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y/N. Indicates if the time was entered manually by the worker or not. Considered as 'N' if empty.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the person id of the user clicked the event

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the assignment id of the user clicked the event

columns.Name: TCLAYFLD_DEFNS_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the Time Card Field

columns.Name: TCLAYFLD_DEFNS_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the TCF used in a layout set

columns.Name: CLICKED_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores the system clicked time

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUM
columns.Comments: The value stored in this column is used for business logic rule

columns.Name: REF_TIMEZONE_ID
columns.Comments: The time zone associated to the Click time

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_OFFSET
columns.Comments: TIMEZONE_OFFSET

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
